creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Fri, Sep 29, 2000 at 10:00:22PM -0700, Cy Schubert wrote:
> New PGP6 port.  PGP 6.5.8 fixes the PGP ADK bug, see

Please remember that this is called an "update", NOT a "new port".  Your
subject confused me because I thought we already had a pgp6 port.

--
